allow: PowerShell($ok = $false; foreach \($i in 1..20\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8001/ -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 1; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok = $true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300 } }; if \($ok\) { Start-Process "http://localhost:8001/"; "opened" } else { "server-not-ready" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 4321,5174,8765,8901,9123 } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; $port = 7654; Start-Process -FilePath 'C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npx.cmd' -ArgumentList '--yes','http-server','-p',"$port",'-c-1','--silent' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\Users\\illu1\\Desktop\\illuminati-ai' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; \(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port $port -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded)
PowerShell(try { & py --version 2>&1 } catch { "py not found: $_" }; try { & py -3 --version 2>&1 } catch { "py -3 not found: $_" }; "---"; where.exe py 2>&1; where.exe python 2>&1)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "STILL UP: 200 OK on http://localhost:8000/ \(bytes: $\($r.Content.Length\)\)" } catch { "DOWN: $_" })
